'''wachuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeekoe|zeekoe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeekoe|zeekoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wachuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchihith|wæchihith]] || [[word:wæchihij|wæchihij]] || [[word:wæchihish|wæchihish]] || [[word:wæchihi|wæchihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachuchuhuth|wachuchuhuth]] || [[word:wachuchuhuj|wachuchuhuj]] || [[word:wachuchuhush|wachuchuhush]] || [[word:wachuchuhu|wachuchuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachuhuth|wachuhuth]] || [[word:wachuhuj|wachuhuj]] || [[word:wachuhush|wachuhush]] || [[word:wachuhu|wachuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachufhuth|wachufhuth]] || [[word:wachufhuj|wachufhuj]] || [[word:wachufhush|wachufhush]] || [[word:wachufhuf|wachufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachuhuthu|wachuhuthu]] || [[word:wachuhuju|wachuhuju]] || [[word:wachuhushu|wachuhushu]] || [[word:wachuhuku|wachuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachuhuth|wachuhuth]] || [[word:wachuhuj|wachuhuj]] || [[word:wachuhush|wachuhush]] || [[word:wachuhu|wachuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachuhuthul|wachuhuthul]] || [[word:wachuhujul|wachuhujul]] || [[word:wachuhushul|wachuhushul]] || [[word:wachuhukul|wachuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachuhuthuthu|wachuhuthuthu]] || [[word:wachuhujuju|wachuhujuju]] || [[word:wachuhushushu|wachuhushushu]] || [[word:wachuhuku|wachuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachuhuthun|wachuhuthun]] || [[word:wachuhujun|wachuhujun]] || [[word:wachuhushun|wachuhushun]] || [[word:wachuhukun|wachuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachuhuthuoro|wachuhuthuoro]] || [[word:wachuhujuoro|wachuhujuoro]] || [[word:wachuhushuoro|wachuhushuoro]] || [[word:wachuhukuoro|wachuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
